title: taraxacum maurum
intro: Taraxacum maurum, also known as the lesser dandelion, is a plant species within the dandelion genus. It possesses medicinal properties due to its high content of inulin, a type of prebiotic fiber, and other compounds like flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Taraxacum maurum include its potential to aid digestion, support immune function, and exhibit anti-inflammatory properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to leverage its medicinal and health benefits.
